introSection: Mad Mouse is an Arrow Dynamics wild mouse roller coaster located at Michigan's Adventure in Muskegon, Michigan, USA. Opened in 1999, the ride is located on the former spot of the park's main entrance. The ride's track and supports were designed by Ride Centerline.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The addition of Mad Mouse was announced in October 1998. It opened in 1999 on the former spot of the park/s main entrance.

Mad Mouse was repainted orange and yellow for the 2022 season.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Orange track and yellow supports. The track was blue prior to 2022.

fullText:
Mad Mouse is an Arrow Dynamics wild mouse roller coaster located at Michigan's Adventure in Muskegon, Michigan, USA. Opened in 1999, the ride is located on the former spot of the park's main entrance. The ride's track and supports were designed by Ride Centerline.

The addition of Mad Mouse was announced in October 1998. It opened in 1999 on the former spot of the park/s main entrance.

Mad Mouse was repainted orange and yellow for the 2022 season.



Orange track and yellow supports. The track was blue prior to 2022.
